## Southern California Postpartum Doula Support

![Multiple hands gently holding a tiny baby feet, captured in black and white.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/697814bdb7e6713bfeef8179/01188965-e38a-4244-bcad-bc0d47edc988/postpartum+doula+support+newborn+stage+new+mom+redlands+inland+empire+coachella+valley+orange+county+newport+palm+springs.png)

**4 The Moms is a holistic, evidence-based postpartum doula service supporting families through the transitional period of the 4th trimester- bringing home your baby.**

Many **first-time parents** don’t realize just how much this trimester entails, and can feel just as overwhelmed as they are in the baby bliss period. Lack of sleep, troubles with lactation and breastfeeding, hormonal changes and birth recovery are just a few common reasons parents reach out for that extra help.

For families welcoming their **second**, **third**, or **fourth child**, postpartum support may look different. This season is about navigating new family dynamics, supporting siblings, learning your new baby’s personality, and adapting to the unexpected changes that can come with each unique newborn.

For families who are becoming parents through adoption, fostering, IVF, surrogacy and more, **support is for you**♡

All services are tailored to meet the unique needs, values, and rhythms of each family as no two postpartum journeys look the same!

**Proudly serving Southern California - Inland Empire, Coachella Valley & Orange County, with virtual support available worldwide.**

![4 The Moms Southern California Postpartum Doula testimonial photo, black and white, of a woman holding a baby on her legs, with another woman lying in bed in the background. The scene is home recovery setting for the 4th trimester.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/697814bdb7e6713bfeef8179/6163812c-f8d4-4ce3-be54-5f42c3e7b93e/+Client+1+%281000+x+1000+px%29+copy.png)

![postpartum doula serving clients in hospital after birth, holding baby](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/697814bdb7e6713bfeef8179/06c00a2a-2d0c-4a7f-93a0-944ac5cd25c5/Client+2+%281000+x+1000+px%29.png)

## What is Postpartum Support?

Postpartum support is professional emotional, physical, and practical support provided to families during in the first 12 weeks of bringing home a baby, often referred to as the _fourth trimester_. The goal of postpartum support is to help parents feel more rested, informed, confident, and supported as they adjust to life with a newborn.

A postpartum doula supports not only the baby, but the entire family unit, with special attention to the recovery and well-being of the mother.

Postpartum support can include: Emotional support and reassurance during the transition into parenthood; newborn care guidance; infant soothing techniques and understanding baby cues; feeding support, including breastfeeding and bottle feeding support; overnight support so parents can rest and recover; recovery-focused support for the birthing parent: sitz baths, prepping padscicles, gentle scar massages for cesarean, and more; sibling adjustment support; light household support related to baby care; meal preparation or nourishment support for the mother; helping families process and adapt to their birth and postpartum experience.

Every family’s needs look different. Some parents may want hands-on newborn guidance during their first weeks home, while others may simply want a calm, knowledgeable presence to help them feel supported and less alone during the transition.

The postpartum period is often filled with both joy and major adjustment. Having dedicated support during this time can help families navigate the physical recovery, emotional changes, sleep deprivation, and new family dynamics that naturally come with welcoming a baby.

## Locations Served

#### **Inland Empire, Coachella Valley & Orange County**

4 The Moms provides postpartum doula support for families throughout Redlands, Loma Linda, Yucaipa, Rancho Cucamonga, Riverside, Palm Springs, Costa Mesa, Irvine, and surrounding Southern California communities.

**Virtual Support Worldwide**
